text: Focus is the art of knowing what to ignore.
author: James Clear

text: Deep work is the superpower of the 21st century.
author: Cal Newport

text: The successful warrior is the average person with laser-like focus.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Concentrate all your thoughts upon the work at hand.
author: Alexander Graham Bell

text: It's not that I'm so smart, it's just that I stay with problems longer.
author: Albert Einstein

text: You will never reach your destination if you stop to throw stones at every dog that barks.
author: Winston Churchill

text: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
author: Stephen Covey

text: Energy, not time, is the fundamental currency of high performance.
author: Jim Loehr

text: Your mind is for having ideas, not holding them.
author: David Allen

text: Do the hard jobs first. The easy jobs will take care of themselves.
author: Dale Carnegie

text: The most productive people I know work with intense focus for short periods.
author: Cal Newport

text: Clarity about what matters provides clarity about what does not.
author: Cal Newport

text: A man who dares to waste one hour of time has not discovered the value of life.
author: Charles Darwin

text: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Lost time is never found again.
author: Benjamin Franklin
